vocab.meaning: cơ sở vật chất hiện đại nhất
vocab.example: My old school has been completely revamped with state-of-the-art facilities, including high-tech science labs.

vocab.meaning: trải qua một sự thay đổi diện mạo triệt để
vocab.example: The campus has undergone a radical transformation, evolving from a small building into a massive educational complex.
There is now a heavy emphasis on technological integration, with interactive whiteboards replacing the old chalkboards.
The school’s pedagogical approach has shifted from passive rote learning to a more student-centered model.

vocab.meaning: các tiện nghi giải trí/vui chơi
vocab.example: They have invested heavily in recreational amenities, such as an Olympic-sized swimming pool and an indoor gym.

vocab.meaning: danh mục các hoạt động ngoại khóa
vocab.example: The school has significantly expanded its extracurricular portfolio to include coding clubs and robotics.

vocab.meaning: môi trường hòa nhập (không phân biệt đối xử)
vocab.example: The institution has worked hard to foster an inclusive environment that supports students with diverse learning needs.

vocab.meaning: một cuộc đại tu toàn bộ
vocab.example: The curriculum received a complete overhaul to align with international educational standards.

vocab.meaning: các sáng kiến xanh/vì môi trường
vocab.example: I was impressed by the new green initiatives, such as solar panels and extensive recycling programs on campus.
Over the years, the school has managed to bolster its academic prestige by producing top-tier graduates.
